purpose: Give school a development vector: choose missing or under-depth topics before asking Codex for school material.

depth_scale.0: absent topic: no usable memory cell
depth_scale.4: can drive school/Codex task without operator repair
depth_scale.5: mature organ knowledge: reusable, self-checking, return-to-parent aware

topics.label: school development vector
topics.why: school needs a compass before choosing lessons
topics.codex_depth_focus: define vector, queues, missing-topic handling, and proof boundary

topics.label: expected theme gap detection
topics.why: school must detect absent required themes, not only weak existing cells
topics.codex_depth_focus: compare expected vector topics against active memory topics and output missing/under-depth targets

topics.label: strong Codex school task template
topics.why: Codex requests must specify depth, candidate rules, proof fields, validators, and cut lines
topics.codex_depth_focus: make single-topic bounded material authoring task with acceptance contract

topics.label: dynamic topic cell routing
topics.why: atoms must merge into matching topic cells or create new topic cells when absent
topics.codex_depth_focus: semantic match, duplicate prevention, new-cell creation criteria

topics.label: school cycle completion proof
topics.why: school completion must mean compact memory update proof
topics.codex_depth_focus: prove absorption PASS, active_memory_changed, compact_memory_updated, cleanup

topics.label: memory topic depth ledger
topics.why: school must know where each topic stopped and where to continue
topics.codex_depth_focus: track current depth, target depth, last proof, next depth

topics.label: one-topic school microcycle
topics.why: large runs should be broken into one-topic cycles around 1000 candidates
topics.codex_depth_focus: 1000-candidate cycle, digest, absorption, cleanup, next selection

topics.label: memory source grounding
topics.why: school must know when it has source basis and when it is extrapolating
topics.codex_depth_focus: source fields, unsupported claim quarantine, external/internal source boundary

topics.label: agent error to school lesson
topics.why: recent operator errors should become school material
topics.codex_depth_focus: convert error evidence into lesson atoms and negative tests

topics.label: organ growth hierarchy
topics.why: deep model of growth: atom, molecule, organ, system, organism

topics.label: matrix memory model
topics.why: optional deep analogy: memory cells as quality accumulation matrix
topics.codex_depth_focus: use as analogy only unless source is explicitly provided

topics.label: lawful development sequence
topics.why: school should learn in ordered depth, not random broad generation

candidate_rules: one candidate must serve the selected topic only
candidate must include expected behavior and failure contrast
candidate must include source_basis or mark source_missing
candidate must be digestible into compact memory
candidate must not invent external facts without source
cut_lines: no writing before PREFLIGHT_PASS for Codex file tasks
